.replace(/男生女生/, "")

ruleBookInfo.name: book_name##\s*<\/?em>\s*

ruleContent.content:
<js>
eval(String(source.loginUrl));

var book_id = java.hexDecodeToString(java.ajax(book.tocUrl));
var item_id = java.hexDecodeToString(result);

  L = 50; //正文字符长度判断
  urls = Get("urls");
  names = Get("names");

  u = e => java.ajax(urls[e] + "/content?item_id=" + item_id + "&book_id=" + book_id);

  // 随机接口
  function random(m, n) {
    return Math.floor(Math.random() * (n - m + 1)) + m;
  }

  let version, content, result;
  let ret = 0;
  do {
      if (/^\d/.test(Map('随机：'))) {
        apis = Map('随机：').replace(/，\s*/g,',').split(",");
        api = parseInt(apis[random(0, apis.length - 1)]);
      } else {
        api = random(0, urls.length - 1);
      }
      api = Get("ci0") < 0 || ret > 0 ? api : Get("ci0");
      java.log((Get("ci0") < 0 || ret > 0 ? "随机接口：" : "自选接口：") + api);
    switch (api) {
      case 0:
        try {
          var Case = 0;
          java.log("接口" + Case + "：" + names[Case] + "\n" + urls[Case]);
          res = u(Case);
          content = java.getString("$.data.content", res);
          if (String(content)[L]) {
            break;
          }
          java.longToast("接口" + Case + "正文为空");
          java.log("接口" + Case + "正文为空");
        } catch (err0) {
          java.log(err0 + "\n接口" + Case + "出错");
        }
      case 1:
        try {
          var Case = 1;
          java.log("接口" + Case + "：" + names[Case] + "\n" + urls[Case]);
          res = u(Case);
          content = java.getString("$.data.content", res);
          if (String(content)[L]) {
            break;
          }
          java.longToast("接口" + Case + "正文为空");
          java.log("接口" + Case + "正文为空");
          ret += 1;
        } catch (err1) {
          ret += 1;
          java.log(err1 + "\n接口" + Case + "出错。轮询失败，尝试重新随机轮询，不行用正版看吧。");
          msg = ret < 3 ? `自动重试次数：${ret}` : "接口好像全挂了，只能去看正版。";
          java.log(msg);
        }
    }
  } while (ret > 0 && ret < 3 && String(content).length < 50);
  function getRes(result) {
      // not comic content
      mat = result.match(/<body[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/body>/);
      // java.log(result)
      return (mat ? mat[1] : result).toString()
.replace(/<blk[^>]+>(.*?)<\/blk>/g, "$1")
.replace(/<\!DOCTYPE html.*/g, "")
.replace(/<tt_keyword_ad.*<\/tt_keyword_ad>/, "")
.replace(/<a epub.*>\s*<\/a>/g, "")
.replace(/<.*?image_domain.*>\s*<\/.*?>/g, "")
.replace(/<h1[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/h1>/g, "")
.replace(/<[^<]+note_ref_(\d+).*?<\/a>/g,(match, num) => getZSImage(num))
.replace(/<aside[^<]+note_ref_(\d+)[^>]+>[\s\S]*?<\/aside>/g,(match, num) => getZSImage(num,match));
  }
  content = getRes(String(content));
  version = "1";
  let item_name = String(chapter.title);
  content = getContent(book_id, item_id, item_name, version, content);
  content = content.replace(/\s*/g,'') == '' ? item_name : content;
  content.replace(/\{\!\-\- PGC_VOICE\:.*\-\-\}/g, "");
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.author||$.copyright||$..user_name##\s*<\/?em>\s*
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let ck = "sessionid=" + (String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) ? String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) : Map('token：'));

getShelf = () => {
  let book_shelf_info = getShelfInfo(ck);

  bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info);
  let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100);
  let urls = [];
  id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGod("API", "/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?", "book_id=" + i.join(",")))
  });

  res = java.ajaxAll(urls);

  let resp = {book_info: []};
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data);
  });

  return resp;
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_info = getShelfInfo(ck);
  let group_bookids = {
    "未分组": []
  };
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info_all.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = [];
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id);
  });
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["未分组"]));
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name));
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []};
  //java.log("awa");
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100);
  let urls = [];

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGod("API","/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?", "book_id=" + i.join(",")));
  });
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls);

  let resp = {book_info: []};
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data);
  })

  return resp;
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = xGod(
    "API",
    "/reading/bookapi/bookmall/tab/v/?",
    "",
    null,
    ck
  );
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
  let data = all.data.tab_item[0];
  let tab = [];
  if (!data.cell_data || !data.cell_data[index] || (!data.cell_data[index]?.book_data && !data.cell_data[index]?.cell_data)) {
    eval(String(source.loginUrl));
    source.removeLoginHeader();
    device_register("API", true);
    url = xGod(
      "API",
      "/reading/bookapi/bookmall/tab/v/?",
      "",
      null,
      ck
    );
    all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
    item = all.data.tab_item;
    for (i in item) {
      data = item[i];
      if (data.cell_data) break;
    }
    tab = data.cell_data[index]?.book_data || data.cell_data[index]?.cell_data;
  } else {
    tab = data.cell_data[index]?.book_data || data.cell_data[index]?.cell_data;
  }

  let bookList = [];
  if (index > 0) {
    let dataList = [];
    for (let i of tab) {
      dataList = dataList.concat(i.cell_data);
      //java.log(JSON.stringify(dataList));
    }
    for (let i of dataList) {
      bookList = bookList.concat(i?.book_data || i?.video_data || i?.post_data || i?.book_group_list?.[0]?.book_list || i);
      //java.log(JSON.stringify(bookList));
    }
  } else {
    for (let i of tab) {
      bookList = bookList.concat(i?.book_data || i?.video_data || i?.post_data || i?.book_group_list?.[0]?.book_list || i);
      //java.log(JSON.stringify(bookList));
    }
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info");
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/");
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1]);
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("/tab/")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]));
  } else result = JSON.parse(result);
}
//java.log(JSON.stringify(result));
const extractData = (obj) => {
  const cellData = obj?.data?.cell_view?.cell_data;
  if (cellData) {
    return cellData.flatMap(item => 
      item.cell_data?.flatMap(subItem => subItem.book_data || []) ||
      item.book_data?.flatMap(subItem => subItem || []) ||
      item.video_data?.flatMap(subItem => subItem || []) ||
      []
    ).filter(Boolean);
  }
  return obj.book_info || 
    obj.detail_list || 
    obj.data?.cell_view?.book_data ||
    obj.data?.video_info || 
    obj.data?.book_info || 
    obj.data?.book_data || 
    obj.data?.result || 
    obj.data || 
    [];
};

data = extractData(result);

if ((result.data && result.data.video_info) || /videoseries_hot_v2|firstonlinetime_new/.test(baseUrl)) {
  cache.put('fq_session_id',result.data.session_id,60);
}

if (/offset=/.test(baseUrl) && result.data) {
  if (!/offset=0/.test(baseUrl) && /false/.test(cache.get('fq_has_more'))) {
    data = [];
  }
  cache.put('fq_has_more',result.data.has_more,60);
}

data = (data && data.length > 0) ? data : [];

JSON.stringify({data: data});
</js>

ruleSearch.author: $.author||$..copyright##\s*<\/?em>\s*
ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
eval(String(source.loginUrl));
var tabs = JSON.parse(result).search_tabs;
var sid = '';
搜索接口1 = 1;
搜索接口2 = 1;
for (i in tabs) {
    if (/书籍/.test(tabs[i].title)) {
        sid = i;
        break;
    }
}

let book_ids = [];
let book_list = [];
let Key   = String(java.get("key"));
let type = Number(java.get("tab_type"));
let page = Number(java.get("page"));
let push = (u, p, t) => {
    try {
        if (!t) {
            // java.log(u);
            t = java.ajax(u);
        }
        let list = JSON.parse(t);
        for (let f of p) list = list[f];
        for (let _ of list) {
            if (!book_ids.includes(_.book_id)) {
                book_list.push(_.book_data ? _.book_data[0] : _);
                book_ids.push(_.book_id);
            }
        }
    } catch (e) {};
}

function getSearchurl(Type,Page) {
    return xGod(
        "API",
        "/reading/bookapi/search/tab/v/?",
        [
            "tab_type=" + Type,
            "query=" + encodeURI(Key),
            "passback=" + ((Page - 1) * 10)
        ].join("&"),
        null,
        ck
    );
}

// 搜索-0
push(baseUrl, ["search_tabs", sid, "data"], result);
push(getSearchurl(type,(page * 3) - 1), ["search_tabs", sid, "data"]);
push(getSearchurl(type,page * 3), ["search_tabs", sid, "data"]);

// 返回
JSON.stringify(book_list);
</js>$[*]
